title: Conditional preload of assets based on viewport size
scenario_context: Preload critical assets per viewport. Mobile gets mobile-sized hero. Desktop gets desktop.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Media attribute on preload.\n2. Browser picks.\n3. Faster LCP.
accessibility_across_viewports: Keyboard order, visible focus, readable labels, hit targets, and content order remain equivalent across mobile, tablet, and desktop layouts.

title: Dashboard widget with adaptive chart type per container size
scenario_context: Small widget: shows just stat. Medium: stat + sparkline. Large: full chart.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-018 widget pattern.\n2. Visualization scales with size.\n3. Container queries.

title: Web fonts with proper preload + variable font for performance
scenario_context: Web font Inter. Preload for fast LCP. Variable font for one file.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Variable font reduces requests.\n2. Preload critical.\n3. font-display swap.

title: App with primary action centered on viewport regardless of width
scenario_context: Primary CTA centered on viewport. Stays accessible at any width.
responsive_reasoning: 1. mx-auto centers.\n2. max-width caps.\n3. Universal.

title: Tooltip on icon button that appears below for touch, above for mouse
scenario_context: Tooltip position depends on usage. Touch tap below (closer to thumb). Mouse hover above (out of way).
responsive_reasoning: 1. Pointer-aware position.\n2. Mouse above; touch below.\n3. Avoids occlusion.

title: Inline error message that appears below input without pushing keyboard
scenario_context: Error appears below input. Should not push layout when keyboard is up.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Reserved space (responsive-260).\n2. Error appears in place.\n3. No layout shift.

title: Game with HUD that respects iOS notch in landscape
scenario_context: Per responsive-263. Game HUD with safe corners.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-263.\n2. Each HUD element respects.\n3. Universal.

title: Drawing app with rotation that doesn't lose layer/tool state
scenario_context: Per responsive-128 + tool state preservation.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Tool state in component.\n2. Drawing scales (responsive-204).\n3. Universal.

title: iPad sidebar that becomes always-visible on iPad Pro 12.9
scenario_context: iPad Pro 12.9 has more room. Sidebar always visible. Smaller iPads use drawer.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Width-based decision.\n2. iPad Pro 12.9 = 1024px+ portrait, 1366px landscape.\n3. matchMedia.

title: Music player with queue panel that minimizes to a strip
scenario_context: Music player. Queue panel expanded shows track list. Minimized shows just track count.
responsive_reasoning: 1. User toggle minimize.\n2. Persists.\n3. State respects.

title: Table search with highlight matching text in cells
scenario_context: Search table. Matching text highlighted in cells.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Mark element wraps match.\n2. Default browser styles or custom.\n3. Universal.
accessibility_across_viewports: Real mark element. Screen readers may announce 'highlighted'.

title: Captcha that adapts visual size for mobile thumbprint precision
scenario_context: reCAPTCHA. Mobile checkboxes larger for precise tap.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Captcha widget native.\n2. Mobile may show larger tiles.\n3. Provider handles.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Library responsive. 2) Universal. 3) Accessibility built in.

title: Avatar group with stacked overlap and count overflow
scenario_context: Show first 3 avatars + '+5 more'. Tap reveals all.
responsive_reasoning: 1. First N + count.\n2. Tap reveals modal.\n3. Universal.

title: Breadcrumb with rich snippet schema for SEO
scenario_context: Breadcrumbs visible to users AND search engines. Use BreadcrumbList JSON-LD.
responsive_reasoning: 1. nav + ol + li for users.\n2. JSON-LD for SEO.\n3. Per responsive-044.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Per responsive-044 + SEO. 2) Both audiences. 3) Universal.

title: Snackbar with action that opens modal — nested overlay coordination
scenario_context: Snackbar with 'View details' action. Tap opens modal. Snackbar dismisses.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Snackbar dismisses on action.\n2. Modal opens.\n3. Z-index hierarchy.

title: Embedded iframe responsive sizing with postMessage communication
scenario_context: Iframe widget on external site. Self-resizes via postMessage to parent.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Widget posts height to parent.\n2. Parent adjusts iframe.\n3. Native ResizeObserver in widget.

title: Hook for detecting if VS Code-style command palette context (Cmd+K)
scenario_context: Detect Cmd+K shortcut globally. Open palette.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Global keydown.\n2. Cmd/Ctrl detection.\n3. Per responsive-060.

title: Activity feed item that adapts to container with rich media
scenario_context: Feed item with text + media. Container-driven media size.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container queries.\n2. Media scales.\n3. Universal feed.

title: Article paragraph with hanging punctuation for editorial feel
scenario_context: Quotes start with hanging punctuation outside text block.
responsive_reasoning: 1. text-indent: -0.4em.\n2. Or hanging-punctuation CSS.\n3. Editorial polish.
accessibility_across_viewports: Keyboard order, visible focus, readable labels, hit targets, and content order remain equivalent across mobile, tablet, and desktop layouts.

title: App layout with adaptive max-width per page type
scenario_context: Different page types have different optimal widths. Settings: narrow. Dashboard: wide. Article: prose-width.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-070.\n2. Variant prop.\n3. Consistent system.

title: Hover preview vs click-to-preview for touch vs mouse
scenario_context: Per responsive-111. Hover for mouse, tap-pin for touch.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-111.

title: Editable headline that grows with content
scenario_context: Inline editable headline. Grows as user types. No scroll.
responsive_reasoning: 1. contentEditable.\n2. min-height + max-height auto.\n3. Universal.

title: Side drawer that respects landscape notch on relevant side only
scenario_context: Drawer from left. Landscape iPhone with notch on left edge. Drawer respects left inset.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Only relevant side has inset.\n2. env(safe-area-inset-left).\n3. Per responsive-053.

title: Photo viewer that locks aspect ratio of original image
scenario_context: Photo viewer. Image aspect-ratio preserved. Container letterboxes.
responsive_reasoning: 1. object-fit: contain.\n2. Aspect preserved.\n3. Letterbox.

title: iPad keyboard shortcut hint UI persistent after first use
scenario_context: User on iPad with keyboard. First time using shortcut. Show subtle persistent tooltip 'Press ⌘K to search'.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Show first time.\n2. Dismiss after use or X.\n3. Persists dismissed state.

title: Settings with two-pane layout: categories + detail
scenario_context: Per responsive-356. Settings master-detail.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-356.

title: CSV-style export button with format choices in adaptive menu
scenario_context: Per responsive-371. Export with format options.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-371.

title: Multi-step form with auto-save draft on each step
scenario_context: Multi-step form. Saves draft to localStorage on each step. Resume later.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Save per step.\n2. localStorage.\n3. Restore on load.

title: Image with skeleton shimmer while loading
scenario_context: Image loading. Show shimmer skeleton.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Shimmer CSS animation.\n2. Hide on load.\n3. Universal.

title: Footer nav with social icons that adapt size per viewport
scenario_context: Footer with social links. Mobile compact icons; desktop larger.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Icon size scales.\n2. 44pt min touch.\n3. Container queries.
